payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. (1) Real fix: push actor-authz now runs only on genuinely-new events (existingEventIds dedup) so a teammate's already-accepted events in your full-log push no longer 403. (2) scope sync auto-claims the local actor name as an alias on ACTOR_MISMATCH and retries — binding is now just `scope remote set` + `scope sync`.
